title: H-rewrite: Apply --help content rewrites + examples + 装/配/跑 mental-model intro (bilingual)
description: Apply rewrites driven by TASK-001's gap list. For all 5 visible commands (`install`, `doctor`, `serve`, `uninstall`, `config`) ensure descriptions carry concrete usage examples. Add a 3-line mental-model intro at the root help: 装 (`fab install`) / 配 (`fab config`) / 跑 (`fab serve` + `fab doctor`). If citty `meta.examples` is supported (verify in command definitions), wire examples there; otherwise append `Example: …` to the description string. Maintain strict bilingual parity — every new/edited key must land in BOTH `en.ts` and `zh-CN.ts`.

files.target: cli.main.description, cli.install.description, cli.doctor.description, cli.serve.description, cli.uninstall.description, cli.config.description (and any new cli.*.example.* keys)
files.change: Rewrite root description with 3-line 装/配/跑 mental model; add concrete `Example: fab <cmd> ...` snippets to each visible command description per audit gap list
Bilingual mirror of all en.ts edits — strict parity per rc.12 broad-gate convention

files.target: Root command meta block (and per-subcommand meta if citty supports examples there)
files.change: If citty supports `meta.examples`, wire example keys via `t('cli.<cmd>.example.<n>')`; otherwise no code change beyond confirming description is rendered

implementation: Read `_help-audit.md` from TASK-001 to get the precise gap list (which keys need rewrites and which need new example keys)
Verify whether citty's command meta supports an `examples` field (read packages/cli/src/commands/index.ts or a representative subcommand)
Draft the 3-line root intro in en + zh-CN: `Install (装): fab install` / `Configure (配): fab config` / `Run (跑): fab serve · fab doctor`
For each of the 5 visible commands, add 1-2 concrete examples (e.g. `fab install --yes`, `fab serve --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8787`, `fab doctor --json --strict`)
Apply edits to both locale files in mirrored order so diff review is straightforward
Run `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build` to ensure i18n bundle compiles
Smoke test: `node packages/cli/dist/cli.js --help` and `node packages/cli/dist/cli.js install --help` show new content

reference.pattern: Citty subcommand meta + i18n catalogue helper `t()`
reference.examples: Existing `cli.install.description` / `cli.serve.description` shape; mirror tone but add examples line

criteria: All 5 visible commands (install/doctor/serve/uninstall/config) have at least 1 concrete `Example:` line in BOTH en.ts and zh-CN.ts (verify via grep)
Root help (`fab --help`) prints the 3-line 装/配/跑 mental-model intro in both locales (LANG=en_US.UTF-8 vs LANG=zh_CN.UTF-8)
Bilingual parity: `diff <(grep -oE 'cli\.[a-z.-]+\.description' en.ts | sort -u) <(grep -oE 'cli\.[a-z.-]+\.description' zh-CN.ts | sort -u)` returns empty
Test command: `pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-shared build && pnpm --filter @fenglimg/fabric-cli build && node packages/cli/dist/cli.js --help | grep -E '装|Install'` exits 0
Behavioral expectation: a first-time user reading `fab --help` sees the install/configure/run mental model and can find a working example for every visible command without consulting external docs

rationale.chosen_approach: Drive rewrites from TASK-001's audit so the diff is bounded and reviewable; prefer citty `meta.examples` if supported (cleaner UX) but fall back to inline `Example:` lines to avoid scope creep
alternatives_considered: Generate examples programmatically at help-render time
Keep examples in a separate markdown doc and link from --help
decision_factors: i18n catalogue is the single source of truth — examples belong there
First-time UX friction is the killer for this RC — concrete examples beat abstract descriptions
rationale.tradeoffs: Slightly larger i18n catalogue (10-15 new keys × 2 locales) for a much more scannable --help

manual_checks: Run `node packages/cli/dist/cli.js --help` (English locale) — verify 装/配/跑 intro renders
Run with `LANG=zh_CN.UTF-8 node packages/cli/dist/cli.js --help` — verify Chinese intro renders
Run `fab install --help`, `fab serve --help`, `fab doctor --help`, `fab uninstall --help`, `fab config --help` — each shows ≥1 example
success_metrics: 0 unmatched keys between en.ts and zh-CN.ts (parity diff is empty)
5/5 visible commands have ≥1 example in both locales
